summary: Kang Hyunwoo attempts a high-stakes quest in the Colosseum to reach 100 consecutive victories, driven by the promise of a massive monetary reward from his stream viewers. During his final match against a high-level opponent named Alley Boss, he utilizes his pet Tangy's buffs and his own combat skills to secure a narrow, hard-fought victory. Following the win, Hyunwoo concludes his long stream and discovers he has successfully earned over 57 million won, reflecting on the exhausting but profitable nature of his work.
key_moments: Hyunwoo initiates the final trial quest for his 100th consecutive Colosseum victory.
Hyunwoo faces a dangerous level 110 opponent, Alley Boss, and relies on his pet Tangy for crucial combat buffs.
Hyunwoo narrowly defeats his opponent, completing the quest and earning a significant sum of money from his viewers.
